diagrams.title: Constructor/Destructor Execution Order in Inheritance
diagrams.description: Shows the LIFO (Last In First Out) relationship between base and derived class construction and destruction
diagrams.purpose: Helps visualize why base must be constructed before derived, and destroyed after derived

diagrams.title: Object Lifecycle Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline showing when constructors and destructors are called for different object types
elements: Program End: Static and global destructors
diagrams.purpose: Understanding timing of construction/destruction for different storage classes

diagrams.title: Stack Frame Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Visualization of how stack objects are created and destroyed during function calls
elements: Function entry → push frame → construct locals
Function exit → pop frame → destruct locals (reverse order)
LIFO order ensures proper cleanup of nested objects
diagrams.purpose: Understanding automatic storage duration and stack unwinding
